outfit_info.outfit_description: This outfit presents a modern sophisticated look featuring a loose-fitting brown coat over a crisp white tank top and a sleek black leather midi skirt. Paired with elegant Mary Jane pumps and a matching tote, it exudes contemporary chic. The ensemble's neutral palette creates a polished and versatile aesthetic suitable for urban settings.

model_attributes.body: Slender and poised, the model stands with an upright and confident demeanor, showcasing the outfit's silhouette effectively.
model_attributes.pose: The model stands front-facing, left hand holding the bag, right hand lightly touching the coat, exuding quiet confidence.
model_attributes.background: A clean, minimalist white studio background ensures full focus on the model and the intricate details of the attire.
